title: ADGM Courts Litigation Funding Rules 2019 Amendment No 1 of 2023
text:
Litigation Funding Rules 2019 - Amendment No. 1 of 2023

LITIGATION FUNDING RULES 2019 - AMENDMENT NO 1 OF 2023
Date of Enactment: 13 December 2023
The Chief Justice of ADGM Courts, acting under powers delegated to him by the Board of Directors of
Abu Dhabi Global Market, prescribes the following rules under section 225(3)(a) and (d) of the ADGM
Courts, Civil Evidence, Judgments, Enforcement and Judicial Appointments Regulations 2015.
Litigation Funding Rules 2019
The Litigation Funding Rules 2019 are amended as follows:
(1) In Rule 7(d) the words “in accordance with section 225(3)(e) of the Regulations” shall be deleted
and replaced with the words “under the Agreement”.
1
